title: techmap: Add support for matching cell types matching a pattern
body:
eg.

```
(* techmap_celltype = "$_DFF_[NP][NP][01]_" *)
module [....]
```

should be equivalent to:

```
(* techmap_celltype = "$_DFF_NN0_ $_DFF_NN1_ $_DFF_NP0_ $_DFF_NP1_ $_DFF_PN0_ $_DFF_PN1_ $_DFF_PP0_ $_DFF_PP1_" *)
```
